title: GoDaddy Inc. to Attend the Wolfe Research 2nd Annual TMT Conference and Present at the Evercore ISI 2nd Annual Technology Conference
text: TEMPE, Ariz., Aug. 16, 2022 /PRNewswire/ — GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE: GDDY), the company that empowers everyday entrepreneurs, today announced that Aman Bhutani, GoDaddy Chief Executive Officer, and Mark McCaffrey, GoDaddy Chief Financial Officer, will attend the Wolfe Research 2nd Annual TMT Conference in San Francisco on Wednesday, September 7, 2022 and present at the Evercore ISI 2nd […]...

title: GoDaddy (GDDY) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: GoDaddy's (GDDY) second-quarter results reflect strong momentum across applications & commerce, and the core platform.

title: GoDaddy Inc. (GDDY) CEO Aman Bhutani on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: GoDaddy Inc. (NYSE:GDDY ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call August 3, 2022 5:00 PM ET Company Participants Christie Masoner - Senior Director, Investor Relations Aman Bhutani - Chief Executive Officer Mark McCaffrey - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Trevor Young - Barclays Matt Pfau - William Blair Brent Thill - Jefferies Elizabeth Porter - Morgan Stanley Aaron Kessler - Raymond James Mark Zgutowicz - Benchmark Mark Mahaney - Evercore ISI Naved Khan - Truist Christie Masoner Good afternoon, and thank you for joining us for GoDaddy's Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Call. I'm Christie Masoner, Senior Director of Investor Relations.

title: GoDaddy (GDDY) Surpasses Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: GoDaddy (GDDY) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 19.15% and 0.01%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
